## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Bridget to financial systems and discuss operational setup for Growth X](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bridget given access to QuickBooks, Chase, Ramp, and other financial systems](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [New QuickBooks instance created for C-corp; old instance for LLC to be phased out](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need to address contractor misclassification risk and transition key people to employees](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Deal.com selected for international payroll/HR; awaiting setup](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### Financial System Access

  - [Bridget given admin access to QuickBooks, Chase bank accounts, and credit cards](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Ramp card system set up for employee expenses and virtual cards](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Upwork account access granted to review freelancer spending](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4003.0)

### QuickBooks Setup

  - [New QuickBooks instance created for C-corp (Growth X)](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
  - [Old instance (FWD Digital LLC) to be phased out but still contains historical data](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
  - [Credit cards and bank accounts synced to pull in transactions automatically](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Contractor Classification Concerns

  - [Many current contractors likely misclassified as employees under California law](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Plan to transition key people to proper employee status to mitigate legal risk](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4557.0)
  - [Deal.com selected for international payroll/HR to help with proper classification](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4575.0)

### Operational Cleanup

  - [Need to standardize company address across systems (considering virtual office)](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Clean up vendor lists and categorizations in QuickBooks](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=2430.0)
  - [Transition recurring payments to new corporate credit card (ending in 5042)](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Hiring and Onboarding

  - [Discussed need for dedicated HR/talent acquisition person](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4500.0)
  - [Art Rothberg engaged as fractional CFO; awaiting engagement letter](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
  - [Stu identified as part-time IT/security resource with valuable experience](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Deal.com account for payroll/HR (Bridget to lead)](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4492.0)
  - [Clean up and categorize transactions in new QuickBooks instance](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4623.0)
  - [Transition key contractors to employee status](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4557.0)
  - [Standardize company address across all systems](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss HR/talent acquisition needs](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=5784.0)
  - [Review Art Rothberg's engagement letter when received](https://fathom.video/share/4PSAfrRE37wuzk8PHa5GQLFgv9YjSdey?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
